mapper.select: SELECT * FROM category ORDER BY level, sort_order

SELECT c.*, CASE WHEN c.level = 1 THEN c.name WHEN c.level = 2 THEN CONCAT(p1.name, '-', c.name) WHEN c.level = 3 THEN CONCAT(p1.name, '-', p2.name, '-', c.name) END as full_path FROM category c LEFT JOIN category p2 ON c.parent_id = p2.id LEFT JOIN category p1 ON p2.parent_id = p1.id
ORDER BY c.level, c.sort_order
SELECT * FROM category WHERE parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT c.*, CONCAT(p1.name, '-', p2.name, '-', c.name) as full_path FROM category c LEFT JOIN category p2 ON c.parent_id = p2.id LEFT JOIN category p1 ON p2.parent_id = p1.id WHERE c.level = 3 ORDER BY c.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category(name, parent_id, level, sort_order, description) VALUES(#{name}, #{parentId}, #{level}, #{sortOrder}, #{description})
mapper.update:
UPDATE category SET name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, level = #{level}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description},
updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category WHERE parent_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE category_id = #{id}
